hotspot_rules: docs/security/asvs/** is audit-only and cannot be edited by implementer slices.
worker/index.ts must be decomposed or explicitly sequenced before concurrent implementation writes.
docs/requirements/12-m1-security-decision-record.md is shared documentation and should be updated by a single docs/evidence slice when multiple workstreams depend on it.
slice_requirements: Each slice must declare owned_files, supporting_files, forbidden_files, and done_when.
Each slice must name required tests and required docs before implementation starts.
Each slice must identify whether a planner or operator decision is required before execution.
audit_handoff_requirements: Implementer slices must report changed files, tests run, docs updated, and controls claimed ready for re-audit.
Planner-owned campaign files may be updated during execution, but ASVS checklist artifacts remain audit-only.
Deferred exceptions require explicit operator approval before the auditor may set checklist status to deferred_exception.
